Do not include local signing files, secrets, passwords, or generated build outputs.
-->

Include the user or developer impact when relevant.

Link the issue this PR addresses, for example:

Fill in the environment used to verify this PR.

## Screenshots or Recordings
<!--
For user-facing UI changes, include screenshots or recordings.
If the UI supports light and dark themes, include both when practical.
Remove this section if it does not apply.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] The PR is scoped to a single change or closely related set of changes.
- [ ] User-facing behavior has been verified on a HarmonyOS device or emulator.
- [ ] UI changes have screenshots or recordings when applicable.
- [ ] New strings, icons, permissions, or configuration changes are intentional.
- [ ] No local signing files, secrets, passwords, or generated build outputs are included.

Add migration notes, known limitations, follow-up work, or reviewer context.
